_meta.title: Programs, subjects & delivery
_meta.note: Real-world sourcing of Nerdy / Varsity Tutors programs, subjects, and delivery model for a sales-agent KB. Retrieved 2026-06-04 from varsitytutors.com (subject, test-prep, how-it-works, schools, classes, guarantee pages), nerdy.com, member-services.varsitytutors.com, and Nerdy investor/press releases. Claims are tagged inline: [VERIFIED] = stated on a Varsity Tutors / Nerdy primary page; [REPORTED] = stated by Varsity Tutors but seen via third-party reviews / search snippets and not re-confirmed on a primary page this pass; [ESTIMATED] = inferred. CONTRADICTIONS RESOLVED: (1) Tutor-network size: pages say both '40,000+ instructors' and '3,000+ subjects' — these are different axes (experts vs subjects), not a conflict; both retained. (2) 'Only 6% of applicants pass' vetting [VERIFIED how-we-help] vs generic 'thorough screening' wording elsewhere — kept the specific 6% figure as the authoritative claim. (3) Live large-format class capacity 'up to 5,000 students' is [REPORTED] from a classes-FAQ snippet; small-group size is given as '2-5' (1:1 packages), '6-9' (SAT class), and '~12 avg' (general classes) depending on program, so group size is stated PER PROGRAM rather than as one global number. (4) Refunds/contract rigidity is from third-party review snippets [REPORTED], not a Varsity Tutors page, and is flagged as such. Pricing ('$50-$100/hr') is [REPORTED] from third-party reviews and may be stale; treated as illustrative, not a quote.

sections.title: Who Nerdy / Varsity Tutors is
sections.text: Varsity Tutors is the consumer learning brand of Nerdy, Inc. (NYSE: NRDY), operating since 2007. Nerdy positions itself as a 'Live + AI' learning company whose purpose-built, proprietary Live Learning Platform connects learners to experts across 3,000+ subjects. [VERIFIED nerdy.com / varsitytutors.com] Varsity Tutors describes itself as the largest live, virtual tutoring platform in the U.S., serving millions of students and families plus more than 1,000 schools and districts. [VERIFIED schools page]

sections.title: Who it serves (all ages)
sections.text: Varsity Tutors serves learners of all ages, from elementary school through college and beyond, including adult and professional learners. [VERIFIED how-we-help] Nerdy frames this as 'preschool fundamentals to professional mastery.' [REPORTED Nerdy press] In practice the grade bands are K-8 (math, reading, phonics, science), high school (algebra, biology, chemistry, physics, literature), and college/adult (calculus, statistics, economics, languages). [VERIFIED how-we-help]

sections.title: Delivery formats at a glance
sections.text: Varsity Tutors offers learning in several formats so a family can pick the level of support that fits: live 1-on-1 private tutoring, small-group classes, large-format 'Varsity Tutors Live' group classes, 24/7 on-demand study support (chat tutoring and essay review), and adaptive self-study with practice tests and flashcards. [VERIFIED nerdy.com / schools / instant-tutoring] All live formats run on the same online Live Learning Platform. [VERIFIED]

sections.title: 1-on-1 online tutoring
sections.text: 1-on-1 online private tutoring is the core offering: a student is matched with a single vetted expert for live, video-based sessions personalized to their goals, pace, and gaps. [VERIFIED how-we-help] Varsity Tutors says it looks at '100+ variables to create a personalized learning plan' and searches its 40,000+ experts to pinpoint the right tutor. [VERIFIED how-we-help] Every session is recorded so the student can rewatch tricky parts and a parent can follow progress. [VERIFIED]

sections.title: Small-group classes
sections.text: Small-group classes place a handful of similar-level students with one instructor, costing less per hour than 1:1 while keeping more individual attention than a school classroom. [VERIFIED classes] Group size depends on the program: SAT prep classes run about 6-9 students, and general live classes average roughly 12 students. [REPORTED classes-FAQ] Small group is a good fit for families wanting a lower price point or students who learn well alongside peers. [ESTIMATED from program design]

sections.title: Large-format 'Varsity Tutors Live' classes
sections.text: Varsity Tutors offers large-format group classes, including free ones a family can register for without buying a paid package. [REPORTED classes-FAQ] These large classes can hold a very large audience (reported up to ~5,000 students) and pair an instructor with a moderator who fields questions in chat. [REPORTED classes-FAQ] They cover academic and enrichment topics and are designed for enriched, low-commitment learning; they are not a substitute for personalized 1-on-1 work. [ESTIMATED]

sections.title: 24/7 on-demand tutoring (homework help)
sections.text: On-demand 'Instant Tutoring' connects a student with a live tutor at the push of a button, with tutors online 24 hours a day and no appointment needed. [VERIFIED instant-tutoring] It covers 250+ subjects (e.g., Algebra, ACT/SAT prep, Chemistry, ESL/ELL, Reading, Writing, Spanish) from elementary through graduate level. [VERIFIED instant-tutoring] Setup is fast ('Get started in 60 seconds') and works on phone, tablet, or computer. [VERIFIED]

sections.title: Chat tutoring & essay review
sections.text: Beyond live video, Varsity Tutors offers on-demand chat tutoring for quick homework questions, test studying, and essay help, available 24/7. [VERIFIED schools snippet] On-demand essay review checks grammar, spelling, content, structure, and references, plus any other areas the student flags. [REPORTED schools snippet] These on-demand options are often bundled into school/district access and membership rather than sold as one-off sessions. [ESTIMATED]

sections.title: Adaptive self-study & practice
sections.text: Self-study tools let learners practice independently between live sessions: adaptive practice problems, full-length practice tests, diagnostics, flashcards, and personalized AI coaching. [VERIFIED nerdy.com / sat-tutoring] Free practice tests and flashcards are available across many subjects and tests through the Varsity Tutors practice hub. [VERIFIED all-course-subjects] Self-study is positioned as a complement to live instruction, not a replacement. [ESTIMATED]

sections.title: The Live Learning Platform
sections.text: All live sessions happen on Varsity Tutors' proprietary online Live Learning Platform, designed to feel like being in the same room. [VERIFIED member-services] It includes two-way HD video and audio, a shared interactive whiteboard, a collaborative document editor, built-in calculators, and subject-specific tools. [VERIFIED member-services] No physical materials or in-home visits are required; the student joins from a browser or app. [VERIFIED]

sections.title: Recorded sessions & playback
sections.text: Every live session is automatically recorded, and the student gets instant video playback to rewatch the harder parts and reinforce learning. [VERIFIED nerdy.com / how-we-help] Parents can watch the recordings to follow their child's progress. [VERIFIED how-we-help] The platform also generates AI summaries of sessions so parents and (in school settings) teachers stay informed about progress and follow-up needs. [VERIFIED member-services / schools]

sections.title: Tutor matching
sections.text: After a family shares the student's needs, an educational director helps set up the account and matches the student to a tutor, using a proprietary algorithm that weighs 100+ variables against a network of 40,000+ experts. [VERIFIED how-we-help] The goal is a tutor fitted to the student's subject, level, goals, and learning style. [VERIFIED] Matching is hands-on rather than self-serve browsing, which is part of why an onboarding conversation kicks off the engagement. [ESTIMATED]

sections.title: Tutor vetting at a glance
sections.text: Varsity Tutors vets every tutor applicant through tutoring simulations, academic and personal background checks, and interviews. [VERIFIED how-we-help] It states that only about 6% of applicants pass this process. [VERIFIED how-we-help] This selectivity is a core sales point: families are matched with screened subject-matter experts, not an open marketplace of unvetted tutors. [ESTIMATED]

sections.title: Satisfaction guarantee & tutor re-match
sections.text: Varsity Tutors offers a satisfaction guarantee: if a student isn't satisfied after the initial session, they can request a different tutor who's a better fit. [VERIFIED guarantee] Reviews report this includes a free re-match session (up to two hours) when pairing the student with a new tutor. [REPORTED third-party] Note: third-party reviews say packages lock in a set number of hours and that getting a cash refund can be difficult — flagged as [REPORTED], not a primary-page claim, and should not be stated as policy without confirmation. [REPORTED third-party]

sections.title: Scheduling flexibility
sections.text: Tutoring is scheduled around the family's calendar; sessions are booked online and the student and tutor can customize the cadence. [REPORTED reviews / sat-tutoring] Purchased tutoring hours are valid for one year, so a plan can be spread out or front-loaded toward a deadline. [VERIFIED sat-tutoring] On-demand tutoring requires no scheduling at all since tutors are available 24/7. [VERIFIED instant-tutoring]

sections.title: How a typical engagement works
sections.text: A typical engagement starts with a conversation: Varsity Tutors learns where the student struggles, where they shine, and what they want to achieve, then builds a personalized learning plan. [VERIFIED how-we-help] An educational director sets up the account and matches a tutor; the student then meets the tutor on the Live Learning Platform for recurring sessions. [VERIFIED how-we-help] Progress is tracked across sessions, with recordings and summaries available for review. [VERIFIED]

sections.title: Math tutoring (full ladder)
sections.text: Varsity Tutors covers the full math ladder: elementary/arithmetic, pre-algebra, Algebra 1, geometry, Algebra 2, trigonometry, pre-calculus, calculus, statistics, and more advanced topics such as linear algebra and differential equations. [VERIFIED algebra/math tutor pages] Math is one of the four headline subject categories on the catalog. [VERIFIED all-course-subjects] Help can be ongoing weekly support or short-term help for a specific class, unit, or exam. [ESTIMATED]

sections.title: Algebra 1 & middle-school math (in depth)
sections.text: Algebra 1 is a core 1-on-1 subject and also offered as a live, expert-led class. The Algebra 1 curriculum covers the fundamentals — expressions, equations, inequalities, exponents, and roots — teaching not just the rule but why it holds and when to use it. [VERIFIED algebra class page] For students approaching the course, a 'Jump Start to Algebra 1' class reviews building-block pre-algebra skills and previews early Algebra 1 concepts. [VERIFIED course page] Middle-school math, pre-algebra, and elementary math are all supported, so a student can get help right at their current level. [VERIFIED math tutor pages]

sections.title: Geometry, Algebra 2 & pre-calculus
sections.text: Geometry, Algebra 2, trigonometry, and pre-calculus are all standard 1-on-1 subjects, bridging Algebra 1 to calculus. [VERIFIED math tutor pages] Tutors help students see patterns, connect topics, and build problem-solving strategies that transfer across problem types rather than memorizing isolated steps. [VERIFIED algebra tutor page] These can be taken as ongoing weekly support or as targeted help before a specific test or unit. [ESTIMATED]

sections.title: Calculus & statistics (high school + college)
sections.text: Calculus and statistics are offered for both high-school and college/adult learners, alongside college-level math coursework. [VERIFIED how-we-help / math tutor pages] College students can get help with calculus, statistics, and economics-style quantitative coursework. [VERIFIED how-we-help] These map to AP Calculus and AP Statistics test prep as well (see the AP section). [VERIFIED]

sections.title: Science tutoring
sections.text: Science is a headline category covering Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Environmental Science, Anatomy, Physiology, and more. [VERIFIED science tutor page] Tutors help with conceptual understanding plus lab report writing, data analysis, experimental design, and problem-solving. [REPORTED science tutor page] They also prepare students for AP science exams (AP Biology, AP Chemistry, AP Physics), state science assessments, and college placement exams. [VERIFIED science tutor page]

sections.title: English, reading & writing
sections.text: English / Language Arts is a headline category spanning reading, writing, literature, grammar, and composition. [VERIFIED all-course-subjects] For younger students this includes phonics and foundational reading; for older students it includes essay writing and literary analysis. [VERIFIED how-we-help] On-demand essay review (grammar, structure, content, references) complements live writing tutoring. [VERIFIED schools snippet]

sections.title: World languages
sections.text: Languages is a headline category with a wide range offered, including Spanish, French, German, Mandarin Chinese, Japanese, Italian, Latin, Greek, and others. [VERIFIED languages tutor page] Each engagement is tailored to the learner's language, current level, and goal — conversational, academic, or professional fluency. [VERIFIED languages page] ESL/ELL support is also available, including through on-demand tutoring. [VERIFIED instant-tutoring]

sections.title: Social studies & humanities
sections.text: Social Studies and Humanities are listed catalog categories, covering history, the study of human society, and related liberal-arts subjects. [VERIFIED all-course-subjects] Subjects range from art history and filmmaking through general humanities coursework. [REPORTED catalog snippet] These are available as 1-on-1 tutoring and, for some topics, as classes. [ESTIMATED]

sections.title: Technology, coding & STEM enrichment
sections.text: Technology & Coding is a listed catalog category: students can learn to code, build apps, and explore robotics and animation. [VERIFIED all-course-subjects] University-level tech and engineering subjects are also covered for college/adult learners. [VERIFIED catalog snippet] These sit alongside enrichment offerings like art and music. [VERIFIED all-course-subjects]

sections.title: Business & professional subjects
sections.text: Business is a listed catalog category, with university-level business subjects available for college and adult learners. [VERIFIED all-course-subjects / catalog] This connects to graduate and professional test prep (e.g., GMAT for business school) and professional certifications (e.g., CPA, CFA). [VERIFIED test-prep pages] Adult/professional learners are explicitly part of the served audience. [VERIFIED how-we-help]

sections.title: Learning differences & enrichment
sections.text: The catalog includes a 'Learning Differences' category plus enrichment subjects such as Music and Art. [VERIFIED all-course-subjects] Enrichment also appears in the live class lineup (academic support, test prep, and enrichment classes), including celebrity-led 'StarCourse' classes. [REPORTED schools/classes snippet] These broaden the platform beyond core academics into interest-driven learning. [ESTIMATED]

sections.title: Test prep overview & formats
sections.text: Varsity Tutors offers structured test prep across K-12 admissions, college admissions, AP, graduate, and professional/certification exams. [VERIFIED test-prep / graduate pages] Test prep is delivered as 1-on-1 tutoring, live small-group prep classes, bootcamp-style intensives, and free practice tests/diagnostics. [VERIFIED test-prep] Programs are typically scoped to the student's target test date, built around a diagnostic, a study plan, official-style practice, and timing/strategy coaching. [VERIFIED test-prep]

sections.title: SAT prep (in depth)
sections.text: SAT prep combines live expert instruction with an asynchronous test-prep app (diagnostic tests, thousands of practice questions, full-length practice tests, flashcards, mobile app). [VERIFIED sat-tutoring] One-on-one packages come in 12, 24, or 36 hours — 12 for help on a particular topic, 24 to master a section, 36 to address weaknesses across all sections — and hours are valid for one year. [VERIFIED sat-tutoring] SAT prep classes run ~6-9 students with 16 hours of live small-group instruction plus an option of 4 or 8 hours of 1-on-1. [VERIFIED sat-class] Prep covers the digital SAT's Reading & Writing and Math sections, and an included SAT eBook (650+ pages) goes deeper on tricky concepts. [VERIFIED sat-class / act page]

sections.title: ACT prep (in depth)
sections.text: ACT prep also pairs live expert instruction with an asynchronous app (question bank, practice tests). [VERIFIED act page] One-on-one ACT packages come in 12, 24, or 36 hours. [VERIFIED act page] It includes live prep classes, 1-on-1 expert tutoring, AI-powered diagnostics that break down strengths and weaknesses by ACT section, and a free mobile app; an included ACT eBook (650+ pages) supports deeper review. [VERIFIED act page] The ACT covers English, Math, Reading, and Science, with Writing optional. [ESTIMATED standard ACT structure]

sections.title: PSAT prep
sections.text: PSAT prep is offered as part of the college-admissions test-prep lineup. [VERIFIED test-prep] It serves students preparing for the PSAT/NMSQT and as an early on-ramp to SAT prep, sharing much of the same Reading & Writing and Math content. [ESTIMATED from SAT/PSAT alignment] Free PSAT practice resources are available through the practice hub. [VERIFIED practice hub]

sections.title: AP exam prep
sections.text: Varsity Tutors offers tutoring for AP exams across the College Board's AP catalog, including high-demand exams like AP Calculus, AP Biology, AP Chemistry, AP Physics, AP U.S. History, AP English Language, and AP Psychology. [VERIFIED AP tutor pages] Tutors often have taught AP courses, scored well themselves, or hold advanced degrees in the subject. [REPORTED AP page] AP prep is available year-round and is commonly started 8-12 weeks before the exam. [REPORTED AP page]

sections.title: K-12 admissions tests (ISEE, SSAT, etc.)
sections.text: For private-school and selective-school admissions, Varsity Tutors prepares students for the ISEE, SSAT, SHSAT, HSPT, and TACHS. [REPORTED test-prep search snippet] These are offered as 1-on-1 tutoring and prep classes scoped to the application deadline. [ESTIMATED from test-prep model] Note: these specific admissions tests appeared in search snippets and a test-prep listing rather than on the main test-prep landing page this pass, so tagged [REPORTED] pending primary-page confirmation. [REPORTED]

sections.title: Graduate admissions tests (GRE, GMAT, LSAT, MCAT, DAT)
sections.text: Varsity Tutors prepares learners for major graduate-entrance exams: GRE, GMAT, LSAT, MCAT, and DAT, for business, law, medical, and dental school. [VERIFIED graduate test-prep page] Options mix live online classes and private tutoring; some classes run ~10 weeks (once weekly) and others are bootcamp-style (e.g., 5 days, ~4 hours/day). [REPORTED graduate page] Tutors target the specific content and test-taking strategy for each exam. [VERIFIED graduate page]

sections.title: Professional & certification exams
sections.text: Varsity Tutors offers prep for professional and licensing exams, including Bar, CPA, NCLEX, USMLE, Praxis, PMP, and finance/securities exams (CFA, CFP, CAIA, SIE, Series 7, Series 65), among others. [REPORTED test-prep / certifications snippet] This extends the platform to adult and professional learners well beyond K-12. [VERIFIED served-audience]

sections.title: State & placement tests
sections.text: Tutors prepare students for state assessments (e.g., end-of-course and Regents-style exams) and college placement exams, alongside subject mastery. [VERIFIED science tutor page / algebra Regents tutor page] This support is typically delivered as targeted 1-on-1 tutoring aligned to the specific test and standards. [ESTIMATED] State-test names vary by state, so the exact exam is matched to the student's location and grade. [ESTIMATED]

sections.title: Varsity Tutors for Schools
sections.text: Varsity Tutors for Schools brings the platform to districts and schools — it has served more than 1,000 schools/districts and logged 10M+ hours of live tutoring. [VERIFIED schools page] The flagship is high-dosage tutoring: 60-90 minutes weekly in 1-on-1 or small groups with consistent tutors, using standards-aligned materials and mapped to RTI/MTSS tiers. [VERIFIED schools page] One login also unlocks 24/7 chat tutoring, live group classes, on-demand essay review, and self-study, with an Admin Portal giving educators insights by student, school, or subject. [VERIFIED schools page]

sections.title: Live + AI tools
sections.text: Nerdy layers AI onto live instruction ('Live + AI'): adaptive practice, personalized coaching, AI-generated session summaries, and AI diagnostics that pinpoint a student's strengths and weaknesses. [VERIFIED nerdy.com / act page / member-services] In school settings, Live+AI tools (introduced for teachers and administrators) help educators review progress and prescribe follow-up support. [VERIFIED schools / Nerdy press] AI is used to enhance and inform live tutoring, not to replace the human tutor. [ESTIMATED from positioning]

sections.title: Memberships, packages & pricing notes
sections.text: Tutoring is generally bought as hour packages or recurring memberships rather than à la carte, and purchased hours are typically valid for one year. [VERIFIED sat-tutoring] Subject and language memberships bundle a matched tutor plus a tailored learning plan. [VERIFIED languages membership] Pricing is not published per-hour on the primary pages; third-party reviews report roughly $50-$100/hour, which may be stale and should be treated as illustrative, not quoted. [REPORTED third-party] Confirm current pricing with a live quote before stating numbers to a customer. [ESTIMATED guidance]
